ques: The first three Top Headlines in the current ESPN home page correspond to which sports leagues?
answer: The page served is ESPN Deportes (geo-redirected from www.espn.com to Spain's Spanish edition), where the "Top Headlines" module is "TITULARES". Its first three headlines all correspond to SOCCER/FOOTBALL — specifically the FIFA World Cup 2026 and Mexico's national team (1: World Cup round-of-16 bracket; 2: FIFA ranking, Mexico beats Czechia; 3: FMF/Mexican federation). All three are the same sport (soccer), not three distinct leagues.
